title: Mulberry Silk Robe - Midnight Navy
description: Wrap yourself in unapologetic luxury with this full-length robe woven from 22-momme Mulberry silk, the highest grade available. The heavyweight silk drapes with a fluid, liquid sheen while remaining breathable enough for India's transitional monsoon evenings. A wide shawl collar frames the face elegantly, and the self-tie waist sash cinches to a flattering silhouette. Deep patch pockets and French seam finishing ensure nothing catches or pills. The midnight navy hue carries a subtle lustre that shifts under ambient light, making it equally striking for morning routines or late-night unwinding.

title: Cashmere-Blend Lounge Joggers - Heather Grey
description: Redefine off-duty comfort with these lounge joggers knitted from a sumptuous cashmere-cotton blend that feels cloud-soft against skin. The fine-gauge knit provides insulating warmth for air-conditioned Indian homes and cool winter evenings without adding bulk. A ribbed drawstring waistband sits comfortably at the natural waist, while tapered legs with elasticated cuffs create a clean, modern profile. Tonal flat-knit side seams eliminate pressure points during extended lounging. Two discreet welt pockets keep essentials close. The heather grey mélange tone pairs effortlessly with any wardrobe palette.

title: Modal Silk Lounge Set - Slate Blue
description: Experience resort-level relaxation at home with this two-piece lounge set combining a relaxed camp-collar shirt and matching drawstring trousers. The modal-silk blend fabric is derived from sustainably harvested beechwood and refined silk fibres, producing an exceptionally smooth hand feel with natural temperature regulation ideal for India's diverse climate zones. The shirt features a clean placket with mother-of-pearl buttons, while the trousers offer a wide elastic waist with an adjustable drawcord. The muted slate blue colourway transitions seamlessly from weekend brunch to evening downtime.

title: Velvet Smoking Jacket - Burgundy
description: Command any room with this statement smoking jacket tailored from plush cotton velvet with a dense pile that catches light in deep, wine-toned reflections. Inspired by old-world gentlemen's clubs yet cut with a contemporary slim profile, it features a peaked satin shawl lapel, single-button closure, and jetted chest pocket. Satin piping traces the cuffs and pocket edges for refined contrast. Fully lined in smooth viscose for effortless layering over a tee during cool Delhi winters or Bengaluru evenings. A timeless investment piece that elevates home entertaining to an art form.
keyFeatures: Material: 100% Cotton Velvet, Satin Trim, Viscose Lining

title: Cotton Jersey Lounge Pants - Olive
description: Built for all-day ease, these lounge pants are cut from heavyweight single-jersey cotton that holds its shape through endless wash cycles. The relaxed straight-leg silhouette gives ample room for cross-legged sitting or stretching on the couch, while a covered elastic waistband with an internal drawcord keeps the fit adjustable. Two deep side-seam pockets securely stash your phone and keys for quick steps outside. The earthy olive tone adds understated style to work-from-home video calls and lazy Sunday mornings alike, perfectly suited for India's cool winter afternoons.

title: Bamboo Modal Henley Sleep Set - Charcoal
description: Sleep deeper in this thoughtfully designed two-piece set featuring a long-sleeve henley top and matching tapered pants. The bamboo-derived modal fabric is naturally hypoallergenic and thermo-regulating, wicking moisture during hot Mumbai nights while retaining gentle warmth in chilly Shimla winters. The henley neckline with three shell buttons adds laid-back refinement, and raglan sleeves prevent shoulder seam pressure when lying down. Pants feature a no-roll elastic waist and open hems for unrestricted ankle movement. The versatile charcoal colourway looks polished enough for morning coffee runs.

title: French Terry Lounge Shorts - Navy
description: These lounge shorts strike the perfect balance between gym-ready structure and sofa-ready softness. Knitted from loopback French terry cotton, the interior loops create a plush cushioned feel against skin while the smooth exterior maintains a clean appearance. The 7-inch inseam hits above the knee for a modern silhouette that works indoors and out. An elasticated waistband with a flat braided drawcord provides secure, adjustable comfort. Ideal for India's long summers, the breathable open-loop construction promotes airflow, keeping you cool from April heatwaves through September humidity.

title: Waffle Knit Lounge Set - Sand
description: Elevate your downtime wardrobe with this coordinated lounge set crafted in textured waffle-knit cotton that traps a thin layer of air for gentle insulation without overheating. The crew-neck pullover features dropped shoulders and ribbed trims, while the matching pants offer a relaxed tapered leg with banded ankles and a drawstring waist. The dimensional waffle weave adds visual interest to the warm sand colourway, creating a refined aesthetic suitable for festive family gatherings or relaxed weekend hosting. Perfectly weighted for India's autumn-to-spring transitional months.

title: Cushioned Ankle Sports Socks - White (Pack of 3)
description: Tackle your morning run or weekend cricket match with confidence in these triple-pack cushioned ankle socks. Terry-looped cushioning across the sole absorbs impact stride after stride, while mesh ventilation panels on top keep airflow constant. The arch compression band locks each sock in place, eliminating slippage inside your trainers. Reinforced heel and toe zones extend lifespan well beyond ordinary socks. A low-cut ankle profile keeps things sleek with sports shoes and sneakers across all seasons.

title: Executive Calf-Length Formal Socks - Charcoal (Pack of 3)
description: Command the boardroom from sole to collar with these charcoal calf-length formal socks, woven from fine-gauge mercerised cotton that drapes elegantly inside dress shoes. The hand-linked toe seam eliminates bulk, so your feet glide smoothly into oxfords and derbies. A gentle rib pattern provides subtle texture without being flashy, and the wide comfort-top band holds the sock at mid-calf without constricting circulation. Anti-bacterial treatment ensures freshness even during back-to-back meetings in air-conditioned offices.

title: Crew Length Everyday Socks - Navy & Grey Combo (Pack of 5)
description: Stock your drawer for the entire work week with this five-pack of crew-length socks in alternating navy and grey tones. A combed cotton base delivers softness and durability in equal measure, while a ribbed leg prevents the sock from sliding down during your daily commute. The cushioned footbed reduces fatigue for those who spend hours on their feet. Each pair is knitted with reinforced stress points for longevity, making this value pack the smartest buy for everyday versatility across casual and semi-formal outfits.

title: No-Show Invisible Liner Socks - Black (Pack of 3)
description: Achieve the sockless look without sacrificing hygiene using these ultra-low-cut black liner socks. A silicone heel grip keeps each sock anchored inside loafers, boat shoes, and low-profile sneakers so you can stride with confidence. The microfibre-cotton blend is featherweight yet absorbent enough to handle perspiration on hot Indian afternoons. A seamless toe construction ensures zero irritation points, making these liners perfect for long walks through the city or casual Friday at the office.

title: Striped Casual Mid-Calf Socks - Olive & Beige
description: Add a pop of character to your casual rotation with these olive and beige horizontal-striped mid-calf socks. Knitted from soft ringspun cotton with just enough elastane to maintain shape, they complement chinos, joggers, and rolled-up jeans equally well. The wide welt top sits comfortably below the knee and won't leave indentation marks. A terry-cushioned sole provides gentle padding for weekend outings, flea-market strolls, and café hopping. Machine washable and quick to dry — low maintenance, high style.

title: Slim Fit Stretch Denim Jeans - Dark Indigo
description: These dark indigo slim-fit jeans are the cornerstone of a modern wardrobe. Woven from heavyweight 12-oz denim with 2% elastane for comfortable stretch that recovers its shape by morning. The tapered leg flatters athletic and lean builds alike, while a mid-rise waist sits naturally without sagging. Five-pocket construction with copper-tone rivets at stress points ensures durability season after season. Pair with white sneakers for weekend brunch or desert boots for a smart-casual office look.

title: Straight Fit Raw Denim Jeans - Midnight Blue
description: For the denim purist, these midnight blue raw selvedge-inspired jeans develop a unique fade pattern that tells the story of your adventures. The straight-fit leg offers a timeless silhouette that never goes out of style, sitting cleanly over boots or sneakers without excess fabric pooling at the ankle. Rigid 14-oz denim softens and moulds to your body over time, creating a truly personal fit. Button-fly closure adds an authentic touch, while deep pockets comfortably hold your phone and wallet.

title: Skinny Fit Washed Denim Jeans - Light Blue
description: Make a statement with these light blue skinny-fit jeans featuring an authentic vintage wash and subtle whiskering at the thighs. The body-hugging cut sits close from hip to ankle, creating a streamlined look that works brilliantly with oversized tees and bomber jackets. Stretch denim with 3% lycra delivers the flexibility you need to sit, bend, and move freely. A zip fly with button closure and belt loops offer a polished finish. Ideal for concerts, casual dates, and weekend getaways across the subcontinent.

title: Relaxed Fit Comfort Denim Jeans - Stone Wash Grey
description: When comfort is king, reach for these stone-wash grey relaxed-fit jeans. A generous cut through the thigh and knee gives you room to breathe, while the straight leg opening drapes naturally over any footwear. The stone-wash finish lends a lived-in character that only improves with age. An internal drawstring waistband hidden behind belt loops lets you fine-tune the fit without a belt. Perfect for long road trips, lazy Sunday markets, and easygoing dinner plans where looking good shouldn't mean feeling restricted.

title: Bootcut Classic Denim Jeans - Deep Black
description: Channel retro Americana with a distinctly Indian edge in these deep black bootcut jeans. The slightly flared leg opening from the knee down balances broader shoulders and accommodates boots with ease. Sulphur-dyed black denim holds its depth without fading to grey prematurely, thanks to advanced dye-lock technology. A mid-rise waist and structured waistband provide a secure, flattering fit for longer torsos. Dress them up with a blazer and Chelsea boots for a night out, or keep it raw with a leather jacket.

title: Utility Cargo Shorts - Olive Green
description: Built for adventure, these olive green cargo shorts pack six roomy pockets — including two pleated cargo pockets with Velcro-flap closures — so your phone, wallet, keys, and sunglasses all travel securely. The durable cotton twill is garment-washed for a broken-in softness from day one. An above-the-knee length keeps the look modern rather than baggy, while an adjustable internal waistband and belt loops offer a customised fit. From Goa beach shacks to Rishikesh treks, these shorts are your weekend warrior.

title: Tailored Chino Shorts - Beige
description: Elevate your summer wardrobe with these beige tailored chino shorts that split the difference between casual ease and polished refinement. A flat-front design and 7-inch inseam create a clean, contemporary silhouette that looks equally sharp at a poolside brunch or a rooftop bar. The peached cotton twill has a velvety hand feel that resists wrinkles, so you stay presentable even in sticky coastal humidity. Side slant pockets and a single welt pocket at the back complete the streamlined construction.

title: Washed Denim Shorts - Medium Blue
description: These medium blue denim shorts channel effortless cool with an authentic enzyme-washed finish that mimics years of sun-bleached wear. A regular fit through the thigh prevents restriction, and the rolled-hem detail adds a crafted touch you can iron flat for a sharper profile. Sturdy 11-oz denim stands up to rough use at festivals, barbecues, and beach volleyball without sacrificing comfort. Five-pocket styling with antique-brass hardware gives these shorts a rugged character that mellows beautifully over time.

title: Quick-Dry Athletic Shorts - Black
description: From the treadmill to the turf, these black athletic shorts are engineered for high-intensity performance. A lightweight ripstop polyester shell dries three times faster than cotton, so you can transition from a sweaty HIIT session to errands without discomfort. Internal mesh briefs offer secure support during sprints and squats, while zippered side pockets safeguard your phone and keys. Reflective piping along the side seam boosts visibility for early-morning jogs on Indian roads. Elastic drawstring waist adjusts in seconds.
keyFeatures: Material: 100% Ripstop Polyester with Mesh Lining

title: Classic Crew Neck T-Shirt - White
description: The perfect white tee is harder to find than it sounds — and this is it. A 180 GSM bio-washed Supima cotton delivers a substantial drape that resists the see-through problem plaguing thinner alternatives. The ribbed crew neckline retains its shape after fifty washes, and side-seam construction ensures the shirt hangs evenly rather than twisting on your body. Pre-shrunk and enzyme-treated for immediate softness. Layer it under a jacket, pair it with jeans, or wear it solo — this wardrobe backbone does it all.

title: Pique Cotton Polo T-Shirt - Navy Blue
description: This navy blue polo bridges the gap between relaxed and refined with its honeycomb piqué knit that breathes beautifully in humid Indian weather. A ribbed collar with a two-button placket keeps the neckline crisp and structured all day. The regular-fit body offers comfortable room through the chest and tapers slightly at the hem for a clean tuck-in or untucked look. Vented side slits allow freedom of movement, while the piqué texture adds visual interest without being loud. Ideal for casual Fridays and weekend brunches.

title: Textured Henley T-Shirt - Olive Green
description: This olive green henley strikes the sweet spot between a t-shirt's ease and a shirt's character. A three-button placket at the neckline adds rugged appeal, while the waffle-textured knit creates depth and dimension that a plain tee simply cannot match. The regular-fit body in slub cotton has natural colour variations that give each piece a one-of-a-kind artisanal feel. Roll the full sleeves to three-quarter length for that effortless layered aesthetic. Perfect for autumn evenings, bonfire gatherings, and laidback pub nights.

title: Soft-Touch V-Neck T-Shirt - Charcoal Melange
description: The charcoal melange V-neck tee is an understated essential that flatters every neckline and pairs with virtually everything you own. A tri-blend fabrication combines the softness of viscose, the durability of cotton, and the stretch of elastane for a fluid, body-skimming fit that never clings. The moderate V-depth is contemporary without being too revealing, sitting just right for layering under a blazer or wearing on its own. Heathered yarn creates a rich tonal texture that hides minor stains and lint effortlessly.

title: Abstract Graphic Print T-Shirt - Dusty Pink
description: Turn heads with this dusty pink graphic tee featuring an abstract watercolour-inspired chest print that feels artistic without being over the top. The heavyweight 200 GSM cotton ensures the shirt holds its structure and doesn't cling awkwardly, while the oversized relaxed fit channels streetwear energy. Silicone-based ink printing stays vibrant through repeated machine washes without cracking or peeling. The drop-shoulder seam and ribbed neckline add contemporary detailing. A conversation starter for gallery openings, café meetups, and music festivals.

title: Slim Tapered Chinos - Khaki
description: These khaki chinos are the Swiss Army knife of your wardrobe — dress them up with monk straps and a blazer, or down with canvas sneakers and a henley. Slim through the thigh with a gentle taper to the ankle, the silhouette is sharp without feeling constricting. Stretch satin twill with a peached finish offers wrinkle resistance and a buttery hand feel that survives long-haul flights and nine-to-five desk marathons. A coin pocket, two deep front pockets, and two buttoned rear pockets handle your daily carry with ease.

title: Wool-Blend Formal Trousers - Charcoal
description: Command authority in the boardroom with these charcoal wool-blend formal trousers that drape with impeccable crease retention. A tropical-weight wool and polyester blend keeps you comfortable in air-conditioned offices and moderately warm Indian winters alike. The flat-front design with extended tab closure sits neatly at the natural waist, while the medium-rise and regular-fit leg create a classic professional silhouette. Fully lined to the knee for smooth drape over dress shoes. Dry-clean or gentle-wash friendly for easy maintenance.

title: French Terry Joggers - Dark Grey Melange
description: Redefine athleisure with these dark grey melange joggers cut from premium French terry that's structured enough for coffee runs and soft enough for couch sessions. A tapered leg with ribbed cuffs creates a clean ankle line that pairs well with retro sneakers. The elasticated drawstring waist adjusts effortlessly, while two deep side pockets and a zippered back pocket keep valuables secure during errands. Unlike fleece joggers that overheat in Indian weather, French terry's looped interior provides warmth without trapping excess heat.

title: Relaxed Linen Trousers - Natural Beige
description: Embrace summer in these natural beige linen trousers that let your skin breathe even at 40 degrees Celsius. European flax linen has an open weave that channels air across your legs, creating a natural cooling effect no synthetic can replicate. The relaxed straight-leg cut with a drawstring-and-button waist offers a resort-ready aesthetic. Characteristic linen creasing adds to the laid-back charm — consider it a feature, not a flaw. Ideal for beach weddings, Pondicherry strolls, and sunset sundowners along the Malabar coast.

title: Wrinkle-Free Formal Shirt - Powder Blue
description: Arrive at every meeting looking freshly pressed without touching an iron. This powder blue formal shirt is treated with a non-toxic wrinkle-resistant finish that sheds creases during wear and dries smooth on a hanger. The fine-count cotton poplin has a subtle lustre that catches light beautifully under office fluorescents. A semi-spread collar frames your tie knot perfectly, while barrel cuffs accept cufflinks for an upgraded look. Darted back panel reduces excess fabric for a streamlined torso fit that means business.

title: Checked Flannel Casual Shirt - Red & Black
description: This red and black buffalo-check flannel shirt channels weekend ruggedness with a brushed cotton weave that's soft enough to sleep in. A regular fit with a curved hem looks great untucked over jeans or layered open over a graphic tee. Two chest pockets with button-flap closures hold your essentials, and the genuine horn-effect buttons add a premium tactile touch. Double-needle stitching throughout ensures the seams hold up to years of wear. Perfect for mountain getaways, winter bonfires, and chilly December evenings in North India.

title: Mandarin Collar Linen Shirt - Sage Green
description: This sage green linen shirt with a clean mandarin collar offers a distinctly modern alternative to traditional collared shirts. Pure linen sourced from French flax fields delivers unmatched breathability for Indian summers, while the mandarin collar adds a refined Eastern-inspired silhouette. A relaxed-regular fit keeps the shirt flowing and airy rather than clinging to perspiration. Full-length mother-of-pearl-effect buttons and a single chest pocket complete the minimalist design. Wear it to art exhibitions, wine tastings, or Sunday farmers' market visits.

title: Premium Biker Leather Jacket - Jet Black
description: Command the road in this jet black biker jacket crafted from full-grain lambskin leather that moulds to your physique with every wear. An asymmetric zip closure, snap-down lapels, and triple-zippered pockets deliver the iconic moto aesthetic with genuine hardware weight. The quilted satin lining allows effortless on-off over layered clothing, while adjustable buckle tabs at the waist let you cinch the fit for a sharper silhouette. Each jacket develops a unique patina over time, making it not just an outerwear piece but a lifelong companion.

title: Aviator Bomber Leather Jacket - Dark Brown
description: Inspired by vintage aviator flight jackets, this dark brown bomber is cut from supple buffalo leather with a distressed finish that whispers old-world adventure. A ribbed knit collar, cuffs, and hemband create the classic bomber shape, while twin flap pockets and an internal zippered pocket handle your essentials. The removable sherpa-lined collar adds warmth for high-altitude winter drives through Ladakh or Spiti. Heavy-gauge YKK zip hardware glides smoothly and endures years of daily use. A statement piece that ages like fine whisky.
keyFeatures: Material: Genuine Buffalo Leather with Sherpa Lining

title: Classic Leather Racer Jacket - Deep Oxblood
description: This deep oxblood racer jacket cuts through the noise with its minimalist café-racer silhouette — a clean stand-up collar, centre-front zip, and zero excess hardware. Crafted from semi-aniline goatskin leather that's been drum-dyed for uniform colour depth, the surface reveals natural grain that testifies to its authenticity. The slim-fit body tapers at the waist for a flattering profile that works on and off a motorcycle. Viscose-lined sleeves let you slip in over sweaters or henleys without catching. A refined rebel's essential in an unexpected colourway.

title: Suede Shirt Jacket (Shacket) - Tan
description: Blur the line between shirt and jacket with this tan suede shacket that's become the defining layering piece of modern menswear. Split suede from premium cowhide has a velvety nap that invites touch, while snap-button closures give it that relaxed workwear edge. Two chest pockets and two side pockets offer ample storage, and the straight-cut hem looks intentional whether tucked or left out. Unlined for lightweight versatility in transitional weather — throw it over a turtleneck in December or drape it over a tee on cool March evenings.

title: Hand-Polished Oxford Shoes - Burgundy
description: These burgundy oxfords are the pinnacle of formal footwear, hand-polished over three stages to achieve a mirror-like patina that deepens with care. Full-grain calf leather uppers are lasted on a classic almond-toe shape that elongates the foot without appearing overly pointed. Closed lacing and a five-eyelet configuration deliver the clean, streamlined appearance demanded by black-tie events and executive boardrooms. A Blake-stitched leather sole provides flexibility and easy resoling, while the cushioned insole supports your arch through hours of standing.
keyFeatures: Material: Full-Grain Calf Leather, Leather Sole

title: Penny Loafers in Vegetable-Tanned Leather - Cognac
description: Slip into effortless Italian-inspired elegance with these cognac penny loafers crafted from vegetable-tanned leather that develops a rich honey patina over months of wear. The hand-stitched penny strap and apron-toe construction honour decades of artisanal cobbling tradition. A flexible Blake-stitched sole and lightly padded insole make them comfortable enough for daylong wear, while the leather lining wicks moisture to keep feet cool in warm climates. Wear sockless with cropped chinos or with patterned socks beneath tailored trousers for a sprezzatura finish.
keyFeatures: Material: Vegetable-Tanned Full-Grain Leather, Leather Sole

title: Chelsea Boots in Pull-Up Leather - Dark Chocolate
description: These dark chocolate Chelsea boots are the ultimate cold-weather power move, built from pull-up leather that reveals lighter tones at flex points for a rugged, lived-in beauty from the first wear. Elastic side gussets and a rear pull tab make slipping them on and off effortless, while the round-toe last offers generous toe room without sacrificing sleekness. A Goodyear-welted rubber-studded sole provides rain-ready traction on Mumbai monsoon streets and Delhi winter sidewalks alike. The 1.5-inch heel adds subtle height and confident posture.
keyFeatures: Material: Pull-Up Full-Grain Leather, Goodyear-Welted Rubber Sole

title: Wingtip Brogue Derby Shoes - British Tan
description: A masterclass in decorative shoemaking, these British tan wingtip brogue derbies feature hand-punched medallion patterns and serrated edges that have been a hallmark of gentlemanly style for over a century. The open-lacing derby construction accommodates higher insteps comfortably, while the full-brogue wing-shaped toe cap adds visual drama. Crafted from box calf leather with a natural grain, each shoe is individually hand-stained to create depth of colour that factory finishes cannot replicate. Paired with a half-leather, half-rubber sole for all-weather confidence.
keyFeatures: Material: Box Calf Leather, Half-Leather Half-Rubber Sole

title: Reversible Formal Belt - Black/Brown
description: Two belts in one — this reversible masterpiece gives you jet black on one side and rich saddle brown on the other, switching via a rotating brushed-nickel buckle with a satisfying click mechanism. Full-grain Italian leather on both faces ensures neither side feels like the backup option. The 35mm width strikes the perfect balance for both suit trousers and smart-casual jeans. Edges are hand-burnished and painted for a seamless finish that signals quality from across the room. Presented in a cotton dust bag, ready for gifting.
keyFeatures: Material: Full-Grain Italian Leather, Brushed Nickel Buckle

title: Bi-Fold Wallet in Saffiano Leather - Navy
description: This navy bi-fold wallet in cross-hatched Saffiano leather resists scratches and moisture with the quiet confidence of a well-made essential. Eight card slots, two currency compartments, and a transparent ID window organise your daily carry without bulk — the wallet slips into a trouser pocket with barely a ripple in the fabric. Edges are heat-sealed and hand-painted in a contrasting tan that adds a subtle designer touch when the wallet is opened. Interior smooth calf leather lining elevates the tactile experience every time you reach for a card.
keyFeatures: Material: Saffiano-Textured Calf Leather, Smooth Calf Leather Lining

title: Handcrafted Leather Watch Strap - Whiskey Brown
description: Transform your timepiece with this whiskey brown watch strap hand-cut from Horween Chromexcel leather, the same heritage hide used by the world's finest bootmakers. Vegetable-tanned and hot-stuffed with natural oils, the leather develops a deep, lustrous patina unique to your wrist over weeks of wear. A quick-release spring bar lets you swap straps in seconds without tools. The tapered profile — 22mm at the lugs narrowing to 20mm at the buckle — creates an elegant proportion that complements both dive watches and dress watches. Hand-stitched with waxed linen thread for heirloom durability.
keyFeatures: Material: Horween Chromexcel Leather, Stainless Steel Buckle

title: Hard-Shell Sunglasses Case - Forest Green Leather
description: Protect your prized eyewear in this forest green hard-shell sunglasses case wrapped in full-grain vegetable-tanned leather. The rigid clamshell frame absorbs impacts from drops and bag compression, while the microfibre-suede interior cradles lenses without scratching coatings. A hidden magnetic closure snaps shut with authority yet opens with a light press. The compact footprint fits aviators, wayfarers, and club-master frames up to 145mm wide. Contrast stitching in cream thread traces the perimeter, adding artisanal charm to an everyday carry essential.
keyFeatures: Material: Full-Grain Vegetable-Tanned Leather, Microfibre Suede Lining

title: Heavyweight Pullover Hoodie - Washed Black
description: This washed black pullover hoodie is built like a tank yet feels like a cloud, thanks to 350 GSM brushed-back fleece that's been garment-dyed for that perfectly faded, vintage-store look. A double-lined hood with flat drawcords frames the face without bunching, and the kangaroo pocket is deep enough to warm both hands or stash your phone. Ribbed cuffs and hem lock in warmth during chilly hill-station mornings, while the relaxed drop-shoulder fit works just as well on a commute as it does at a bonfire. A cold-weather icon that only gets better with age.

title: Crew Neck Sweatshirt - Heather Grey
description: The heather grey crew neck sweatshirt is the unsung hero of transitional dressing — warm enough for early-morning Delhi winters, light enough to throw on during a Bangalore evening breeze. A loopback cotton construction breathes better than fleece, preventing the overheating problem common with cheaper alternatives. Set-in sleeves and a clean crew neckline give it a slightly more refined feel than typical gym-issue sweats, making it boardroom-adjacent when layered under a structured overcoat. Subtle raglan shoulder stitching adds visual interest to the minimalist design.

title: Tapered Track Pants with Zip Pockets - Black
description: Upgrade your gym-to-street game with these black tapered track pants that refuse to look sloppy. A four-way stretch polyester-cotton blend moves with squats and lunges yet retains its structured drape for post-workout errands. Zippered side pockets eliminate the jingle of keys and the anxiety of phones falling out during a jog, while the elasticated drawstring waist adjusts to your exact comfort level. A tapered leg with elasticated ankle cuffs stacks neatly over trainers, creating a silhouette that's athletic without being skin-tight. Contrast side-seam piping adds a sporty finishing touch.

title: Unstructured Knit Blazer - Slate Blue
description: This slate blue unstructured knit blazer is the modern gentleman's answer to the stiff suit jacket — all the sophistication, none of the rigidity. Ponte knit fabric drapes like a cardigan yet holds a blazer's lapels and pocket structure with conviction. The absence of shoulder pads and canvas interlining means it folds flat into a carry-on without creasing. Two-button closure, patch pockets, and a notch lapel maintain classic proportions, while the stretch fabrication lets you drive, dine, and dance without restriction. Perfect for smart-casual weddings, client dinners, and first dates.
keyFeatures: Material: 70% Viscose, 25% Nylon, 5% Elastane Ponte Knit

title: Silk Nightgown - Champagne Gold
description: Drift into indulgent relaxation with this champagne gold nightgown cut from 100% Grade 6A Mulberry silk that feels like liquid luxury against your skin. The bias-cut silhouette drapes gracefully to mid-calf length, flattering every body type with effortless elegance. Delicate French seams lie flat for irritation-free comfort, while adjustable silk-covered straps allow a customised fit. The naturally temperature-regulating silk keeps you cool during sultry Indian summers and gently warm on winter evenings. A timeless piece that transforms your nightly routine into a self-care ritual.

title: Cashmere Wrap Cardigan - Dusty Rose
description: Wrap yourself in cloud-like softness with this dusty rose cardigan knitted from fine-gauge Mongolian cashmere. The generous shawl collar and open-front drape create an effortlessly chic silhouette whether you are curled up with a book or hosting an intimate dinner at home. Ribbed cuffs and a wide self-tie belt cinch the waist for a polished look that transitions seamlessly from lounge to brunch. The lightweight yet insulating cashmere breathes beautifully in air-conditioned Indian interiors and provides gentle warmth during cool hill-station evenings.

title: Velvet Robe - Deep Plum
description: Make a statement in plush luxury with this deep plum robe tailored from heavyweight silk-blend velvet that catches the light with a rich, dimensional sheen. The floor-length cut and wide kimono sleeves exude old-Hollywood glamour, while the interior is lined with smooth satin for a sumptuous feel against bare skin. A matching velvet sash cinches at the waist, and deep patch pockets add understated practicality. Perfect for leisurely weekend mornings or elegant evenings at home, this robe transforms everyday lounging into a decadent experience suited to India's cooler months.

title: Cotton Modal Lounge Set - Sage Green
description: Elevate your at-home wardrobe with this sage green two-piece lounge set combining a relaxed drop-shoulder top with matching tapered joggers. The cotton-modal blend fabric is enzyme-washed for a lived-in softness that improves with every wash, while its natural breathability makes it ideal for India's warm and humid climate. The top features a subtle boat neckline and side slits for easy movement, while the joggers have a drawstring waist and ribbed ankle cuffs for a contemporary silhouette. Equally suited for work-from-home days, errand runs, or lazy Sunday brunches.

title: Ribbed Knit Lounge Pants - Oatmeal
description: These oatmeal ribbed knit lounge pants strike the perfect balance between polished and relaxed. Crafted from a soft organic cotton and recycled polyester blend, the wide-rib texture adds visual depth while the high-rise elastic waistband provides gentle hold without constriction. A straight wide-leg cut flows from hip to ankle, creating a flattering drape that pairs beautifully with fitted tops and oversized knits alike. The breathable open-knit construction is well-suited for transitional weather across Indian cities, keeping you comfortable during cool monsoon evenings and mild winter afternoons.

title: Satin Cami & Shorts Set - Blush
description: Slip into breezy elegance with this blush satin camisole and shorts set designed for warm Indian nights. The camisole features a flattering V-neckline with delicate eyelash lace trim along the neckline and hem, while adjustable straps ensure a secure, customised fit. The matching shorts sit at a comfortable mid-rise with a concealed elastic waistband and a relaxed leg opening for unrestricted movement. The premium sandwashed satin has a matte-luxe finish that resists clinging and feels cool against the skin. A thoughtful gift-worthy set that doubles as chic weekend brunch wear.

title: White Cotton Ankle Socks (Pack of 5)
description: Keep things classic with this five-pack of crisp white ankle socks in ring-spun cotton. The reinforced heel and toe zones resist wear, while the ribbed arch band hugs the midfoot for a stay-put fit during brisk walks and gym sessions. A cushioned sole absorbs impact, and the breathable mesh panel across the instep allows airflow on warm days. The ankle-height cuff sits neatly inside sneakers and loafers without bunching. An everyday workhorse that emerges from the wash looking fresh, season after season.

title: Black Ribbed Knee-High Socks
description: These black ribbed knee-high socks bring a touch of collegiate charm to skirts and shorts during cooler months. Knitted from a cotton-nylon blend, the vertical rib texture ensures a snug yet non-constricting fit along the calf. A soft elastic top band holds them in place without leaving marks on the skin. They layer beautifully inside tall boots for winter outings or stand on their own as a statement piece with loafers and a pleated skirt. Ideal for Bangalore's pleasant winters or Delhi's foggy mornings.

title: Nude No-Show Socks (Pack of 3)
description: Achieve a sockless look without the discomfort with this three-pack of nude no-show socks featuring a silicone heel grip that locks them in place inside ballet flats, slip-ons, and low-profile sneakers. The ultra-thin microfibre construction is virtually invisible under any shoe while still protecting your feet from blisters and odour. Antimicrobial treatment keeps them fresh through long Indian summer days. The seamless toe closure prevents irritation, making these an indispensable companion for women who prefer a clean barefoot aesthetic.

title: Mustard Geometric Patterned Socks
description: Add a pop of personality to casual outfits with these mustard yellow crew-length socks adorned in a modern geometric diamond pattern in contrasting ivory and teal. Crafted from a plush combed-cotton blend, they feel cosy against the skin without overheating. The hand-linked toe seam lies flat for all-day smoothness, while the wide welt top ensures a comfortable hold at the calf. A fun accent to roll-up jeans and canvas sneakers on weekend brunch dates or campus strolls in the mild autumn breeze.

title: Emerald Green Georgette Blouse
description: Command attention in this emerald green georgette blouse featuring billowy bishop sleeves and a flattering V-neckline with a single fabric-covered button closure. The fluid georgette drapes gracefully, skimming the torso for a relaxed yet polished silhouette. Pair it with high-waist trousers for a boardroom-ready look or tuck it into a saree skirt for a contemporary festive ensemble. The lightweight weave breathes easily through warm Indian afternoons, while the jewel-tone colour photographs beautifully in both natural and indoor light.

title: Coral Ribbed Knit Crop Top
description: This coral ribbed knit crop top strikes the perfect balance between trendy and comfortable. The body-skimming rib texture highlights your frame while the cotton-rich blend keeps you cool on sun-soaked city walks. A subtle crew neckline and cap sleeves keep the design minimal and layering-friendly — throw a denim jacket over it during breezy evenings. The cropped hemline pairs seamlessly with high-waist palazzos, skirts, and paper-bag trousers, making it a go-to piece for weekend brunches and college hangouts alike.

title: Burgundy Peplum Top
description: Make a statement with this burgundy peplum top that flatters every body type thanks to its nipped waist and flared hem. The structured scuba-knit fabric holds the peplum's shape without wrinkling, ideal for transitioning straight from an office presentation to an after-work dinner. Short fluted sleeves add a feminine touch, while the concealed back zip ensures a clean front line. The deep wine hue complements Indian skin tones beautifully and pairs effortlessly with slim-fit trousers, pencil skirts, or even churidar bottoms for fusion styling.

title: Sage Green Linen Tunic
description: Channel relaxed sophistication with this sage green pure linen tunic, cut to a loose A-line silhouette that falls just above the knee. Side slits add ease of movement, while the mandarin collar and roll-up tab sleeves lend a smart-casual edge. Two patch pockets at the hip bring functional charm. Linen's natural thermoregulation makes this piece indispensable during Indian summers, keeping you airy from commute to café. Wear it over leggings for a quick errand run or belt it at the waist for a more defined look.

title: Teal Pleated Palazzos
description: These teal pleated palazzos bring dramatic flair to your everyday wardrobe with their sweeping wide-leg silhouette and permanent accordion pleats that fan out with every step. Crafted from lightweight crepe, they drape fluidly and resist wrinkling — perfect for long flights or back-to-back meetings. The elasticated waistband sits comfortably at the natural waist, and the full length grazes the ankle for an elongated look. Style them with a fitted top and wedges for festive gatherings or a simple cotton tee for relaxed weekend vibes.

title: Ivory Linen Culottes
description: These ivory linen culottes redefine warm-weather dressing with their calf-length cut and generous A-line flare that catches the breeze beautifully. A high-rise waistband with a self-tie belt cinches the waist, creating an hourglass illusion. Deep side-seam pockets add practicality without disrupting the clean lines. The natural linen fibres soften gorgeously with each wash, developing a lived-in character you will love. From coastal getaways to Saturday farmers' markets, these culottes bring effortless European elegance to the Indian wardrobe.

title: Charcoal Straight-Fit Formal Trousers
description: Anchor your workwear capsule with these charcoal straight-fit formal trousers in a wrinkle-resistant poly-viscose blend. The mid-rise waist and hook-and-bar closure deliver a tailored look, while the straight leg falls cleanly over both flats and heels. Front creases maintain a sharp pressed appearance through marathon boardroom days. Two slanted front pockets and one welt back pocket offer discreet storage. Machine-washable and quick-drying, they are engineered for busy professionals who need polished style without high-maintenance care routines.

title: Black High-Waist Ankle-Length Leggings
description: These black high-waist ankle-length leggings are the ultimate multitasker, engineered from buttery-soft four-way stretch fabric that moves seamlessly from yoga mat to grocery run. The wide power-mesh waistband smooths the midsection and stays anchored during inversions and squats. Flatlock seams prevent chafing, and the gusseted crotch allows unrestricted movement. A hidden waistband pocket secures your key or card. The opaque matte finish means no see-through moments, even during deep stretches — making them a confidence-boosting staple for active Indian women.

title: Navy Floral Tiered Maxi Dress
description: Float through the season in this navy maxi dress splashed with hand-painted-style floral motifs in peach and olive. Three cascading tiers create graceful movement, while a smocked bodice with a sweetheart neckline fits snugly without a zip. Adjustable spaghetti straps and a subtle side slit keep things comfortable and breezy during Goan beach holidays or rooftop sundowners. The rayon-viscose fabric is lightweight enough for tropical heat yet substantial enough to drape beautifully. Simply add strappy sandals and gold hoops for an effortlessly chic look.

title: Dusty Rose Pleated Midi Dress
description: This dusty rose pleated midi dress exudes understated romance with its permanent micro-pleats that shimmer gently under ambient light. The fit-and-flare construction features a fitted bodice flowing into a swirling midi skirt that hits mid-calf. Short flutter sleeves frame the shoulders, and a self-fabric tie at the waist defines the silhouette. The crinkle-resistant pleats mean you can pack it for destination weddings without worrying about ironing. Equally at home at a sangeet ceremony or an anniversary dinner, it pairs perfectly with embellished juttis or stiletto heels.

title: Black Bodycon Dress with Square Neckline
description: Own every entrance in this sleek black bodycon dress featuring a contemporary square neckline and thick shoulder straps that provide comfortable support. The ponte-knit fabric sculpts the body while offering enough stretch to sit, dance, and move freely at after-dark events. A knee-length hemline keeps the look sophisticated rather than overtly bold. Discreet darting at the bust ensures a flattering shape across sizes. Style it with a blazer and court shoes for corporate cocktails, or go bare-armed with statement earrings for a night out in the city.

title: Olive Green Crepe Wrap Dress
description: The timeless wrap silhouette gets a refreshing update in this olive green crepe dress. A true-wrap construction with an internal tie and external sash allows you to adjust the fit to your comfort, making it universally flattering from XS to XL. Three-quarter sleeves add coverage for air-conditioned offices, while the flowing knee-length skirt moves elegantly as you walk. The matte crepe fabric resists static and drapes without clinging. Transition effortlessly from a client meeting to a dinner date by swapping flats for kitten heels.

title: Chambray Blue Cotton Shirt Dress
description: Blending workwear structure with weekend ease, this chambray blue cotton shirt dress features a crisp collar, front button placket, and a removable woven belt that cinches the relaxed silhouette. Rolled-up sleeve tabs let you switch between full and elbow-length coverage depending on the weather. The above-knee length keeps it youthful, while chest and hip pockets add utilitarian charm. Soft washed cotton feels broken-in from the first wear, and the faded indigo hue develops richer character over time — ideal for women who value laid-back, Insta-worthy style.

title: Midnight Blue Skinny Jeans
description: These midnight blue skinny jeans hug every curve with power-stretch denim that retains its shape wash after wash, eliminating the dreaded knee-bag effect. The high-rise waist smooths the midsection, and the tapered ankle opening stacks neatly over boots or slips into sneakers. Five-pocket construction with antique-brass hardware adds classic detailing. The dark indigo rinse is incredibly versatile — dress it up with a silk blouse for dinner or keep it casual with a graphic tee on Saturday. Essential denim for every Indian woman's closet.

title: Light Wash Wide-Leg Jeans
description: Capture retro cool with these light wash wide-leg jeans that sweep from a fitted high waist into a dramatic full-length flare. Non-stretch 100% cotton denim delivers an authentic rigid feel that softens with wear, developing unique fading patterns. Subtle whiskering and a clean raw hem add artisanal character. The elongating wide leg pairs beautifully with platform sandals for maximum height or chunky sneakers for a street-style edge. A modern interpretation of 70s style tailored for today's trend-savvy Indian woman.

title: Medium Indigo Mom Jeans
description: These medium indigo mom jeans bring nostalgic 90s charm into your modern rotation with a high-rise waist, relaxed hip, and gently tapered leg that creates a flattering vintage silhouette. Rigid cotton denim with a touch of stretch offers comfort without sacrificing the authentic stiff-denim character. Double-button waist closure adds a design-forward detail, while five classic pockets provide everyday utility. The ankle-cropped length showcases your footwear — from kolhapuri chappals to white trainers. Effortlessly cool for flea markets, college campuses, and casual Fridays.

title: Faded Blue Denim Shorts
description: Sun-ready and effortlessly casual, these faded blue denim shorts feature a mid-rise fit with a raw-edge hem that gives them a lived-in, cut-off vibe. The cotton-stretch denim moulds to your shape without restricting movement, whether you are cycling through Pondicherry's lanes or exploring a weekend bazaar. Classic five-pocket styling and a zip-fly with button closure keep the construction timeless. The mid-thigh length offers a balanced amount of coverage. Pair with a breezy linen shirt knotted at the waist for the quintessential Indian summer look.

title: Beige Relaxed Linen Shorts
description: Embrace slow-fashion ease in these beige linen shorts designed for hot-weather comfort. The relaxed fit and drawstring waist make them as easy to slip on as pyjamas, yet the clean tailored finish keeps them presentable for resort breakfasts and seaside cafés. Deep side pockets hold your phone and sunscreen, while the above-knee inseam flatters the leg. The pure linen weave allows air to circulate freely, drying quickly after sudden monsoon showers. Their neutral tone coordinates with virtually any colour, making packing for holidays a breeze.

title: Black Paperbag High-Waist Shorts
description: These black paperbag-waist shorts deliver polished charm with their gathered high waist, self-fabric belt, and pressed front pleats. The structured cotton-twill fabric holds its shape through the day, offering a smarter alternative to casual cut-offs for city outings and informal office Fridays. A concealed side zip ensures a smooth front profile, while the mid-thigh length keeps the proportions sophisticated. Tuck in a crisp white shirt for a Parisian-café aesthetic, or go breezy with a pastel camisole for weekend shopping strolls through Indian malls.

title: Black Classic Biker Leather Jacket
description: Channel fearless attitude with this black biker jacket crafted from supple full-grain lambskin leather that moulds to your body over time, becoming uniquely yours. The asymmetric zip closure, notched lapels, and trio of zip pockets stay true to classic moto heritage, while the tailored-slim fit flatters the feminine frame. A quilted lining adds warmth without bulk during chilly Delhi winters and Himalayan road trips. Burnished gunmetal hardware elevates every detail. Layer it over a saree blouse for contemporary Indo-Western fusion or throw it across a hoodie for weekend edge.

title: Tan Cropped Leather Jacket
description: This tan cropped leather jacket in smooth nappa sheepskin sits at the natural waist, making it the perfect companion for high-waist jeans, flared skirts, and midi dresses. The warm caramel tone deepens beautifully with age, developing a patina that tells your story. A clean collarless neckline and snap-button front keep the design minimal and modern, while princess seams create a sculpted fit. The cotton-twill lining breathes well during transitional weather. An investment piece that transitions effortlessly from autumn layering to spring-evening cover-ups across India's diverse climate zones.

title: Burgundy Trench-Style Leather Coat
description: Make a commanding entrance in this burgundy trench-style leather coat that merges classic British tailoring with luxurious cowhide leather. A double-breasted front with oversized tortoiseshell buttons, wide lapels, and a waist-tie belt create a dramatic hourglass silhouette that falls to mid-calf. Storm flaps at the shoulders and a back vent add authentic trench details, while a satin lining allows effortless layering over knitwear. The rich wine colour is an elegant departure from standard black or brown — a showpiece for art gallery openings, theatre nights, and high-altitude winter retreats.

title: Forest Green Leather Bomber Jacket
description: This forest green leather bomber jacket brings sporty sophistication to premium outerwear. Crafted from butter-soft goatskin with a subtle pebble-grain finish, it features a ribbed collar, cuffs, and hem that define the relaxed bomber silhouette. An antique-brass front zip and two angled welt pockets complete the streamlined design. The deep emerald hue stands out amid the usual black-and-brown crowd, capturing attention without trying too hard. A padded polyester lining provides insulation for Manali winters and breezy Bangalore evenings alike. Pair with a silk scarf and ankle boots for elevated weekend style.

title: Cognac Leather Structured Tote Bag
description: Carry your world in this cognac leather structured tote crafted from vegetable-tanned cowhide that ages into a magnificent warm patina. The generous interior fits a 14-inch laptop, A4 documents, and daily essentials in three organised compartments. Rolled top handles sit comfortably on the shoulder, while a detachable crossbody strap offers hands-free versatility during bustling Mumbai commutes. Polished brass feet protect the base from surface scratches. The clean architectural lines make it equally at home in a corporate corridor and a weekend art exhibition.

title: Blush Pink Leather Crossbody Bag
description: This blush pink crossbody bag in pebble-grain calfskin is the perfect compact companion for days when you want to travel light. A flap closure with a concealed magnetic snap keeps belongings secure, while the adjustable leather strap lets you customise the drop from hip to waist height. Inside, a zip pocket safeguards your cards and keys, and a slip pocket organises your phone. The soft pastel tone adds a romantic accent to both Indian ethnic wear and Western casuals. Lightweight yet structurally refined, it transitions seamlessly from brunch to bazaar.

title: Midnight Black Embossed Leather Clutch
description: Elevate your evening ensemble with this midnight black clutch featuring an intricate croc-embossed pattern on premium lambskin leather. The slim rectangular frame holds essentials — phone, cards, lipstick, and compact — without adding bulk to your silhouette. A detachable gold-tone chain strap lets you switch between a handheld clutch and a shoulder bag within seconds. The suede-lined interior protects delicate screens, and a magnetic closure offers quick access. Whether attending a Diwali gala or a cocktail soirée, this clutch adds a whisper of glamour to every outfit.

title: Camel Brown Leather Satchel Bag
description: This camel brown satchel bag draws inspiration from vintage Cambridge style, reimagined with Indian craftsmanship in full-grain buffalo leather. The structured boxy shape features a front flap with a push-lock closure, two interior compartments, and a padded tablet sleeve. A top carry handle and removable shoulder strap accommodate multiple carrying preferences. Hand-stitched edges and raw-cut leather details celebrate artisanal quality. The natural tan will darken gracefully with exposure to sunlight and oils, creating an heirloom piece that accompanies you through career milestones and cross-country adventures.

title: Deep Teal Leather Hobo Bag
description: Slouchy yet refined, this deep teal hobo bag in soft Italian-finish nappa leather drapes beautifully on the shoulder, conforming to your body's curve. The crescent-shaped design opens via a top zip to reveal a spacious unlined interior with a suede-backed zip pocket and two slip pockets. The single wide strap distributes weight evenly, making it comfortable for all-day carry through crowded metros and weekend markets. The jewel-tone teal is a refreshing alternative to neutral bags, adding a burst of colour to monochrome outfits and earthy ethnic ensembles alike.

title: Nude Patent Stiletto Heels
description: These nude patent stiletto heels are every stylist's secret weapon, offering leg-lengthening elegance that complements every skin tone and outfit. The pointed toe and 100mm heel create a streamlined silhouette, while the cushioned leather insole ensures you can navigate cocktail parties and wedding receptions without fatigue. An adjustable ankle strap with a gold-tone buckle provides secure support. The Italian-grade patent finish reflects light with a mirror-like sheen, elevating sarees, gowns, and tailored suits with equal finesse. A wardrobe investment you will reach for on every dressy occasion.
keyFeatures: Material: Patent Genuine Leather Upper, Leather Sole

title: Dark Brown Leather Knee-High Boots
description: Stride through winter with authority in these dark brown knee-high boots fashioned from richly oiled pull-up leather that develops unique markings with wear. The stacked 60mm block heel provides confident stability on uneven Delhi pavements and Shimla cobblestones, while the almond toe offers a refined shape. A medial zip runs from ankle to calf for easy on-off access, and the full leather lining regulates temperature to keep feet comfortable. Pair them with midi skirts and oversized knitwear for a sophisticated layered look that conquers the Indian winter in style.
keyFeatures: Material: Genuine Oiled Pull-Up Leather, Leather Lining

title: Ivory Leather Penny Loafers
description: These ivory leather penny loafers marry preppy heritage with contemporary femininity. Hand-burnished calfskin uppers feature the iconic saddle strap across the vamp, while a low 20mm block heel adds just enough lift for a flattering posture. The blake-stitched leather sole offers flexibility and a sleek profile, and the memory-foam footbed cushions every step. They slip on effortlessly for boardroom presentations, gallery walks, and al fresco lunches. The off-white shade pairs strikingly with cropped trousers and bare ankles, bringing a European ease to Indian professional dressing.
keyFeatures: Material: Genuine Calfskin Leather, Blake-Stitched Leather Sole

title: Emerald Suede Pointed-Toe Mules
description: Slip into effortless glamour with these emerald suede mules featuring a sculpted 70mm kitten heel and a sharply pointed toe. The kid-suede upper feels impossibly soft against the skin, while the padded leather insole cradles the foot for prolonged wear. The backless design makes them the quickest dressy shoe to reach for when heading out the door. The rich emerald shade brings a jewel-toned pop to neutral tailoring, floral dresses, and monochromatic evening looks. Perfect for festive dinners, intimate gatherings, or adding a statement touch to smart-casual workdays.
keyFeatures: Material: Genuine Kid-Suede Upper, Leather Insole

title: Paisley Print Silk Scarf
description: Wrap yourself in heritage with this paisley print silk scarf digitally printed on sumptuous 16-momme twill silk. The intricate paisley motif in ruby, gold, and navy draws from traditional Kashmiri artistry, reimagined with crisp modern lines. The generous 90cm square can be draped as a neckerchief, tied onto a handbag, worn as a headband, or knotted into a halter top — offering endless styling possibilities. Hand-rolled edges speak to artisanal quality, and the luminous sheen of pure silk catches light beautifully. A wearable work of art that elevates any outfit instantly.

title: Black Leather Waist Belt with Gold Buckle
description: Define your waistline with this black leather belt featuring a sculptural gold-tone oval buckle that serves as a miniature piece of jewellery. The 30mm-wide strap is cut from Florentine bridle leather, renowned for its firmness and ability to develop a lustrous patina over years of use. Five adjustment holes and a keeper loop ensure a precise fit over blazers, kurtis, shirt dresses, and high-waist trousers. The understated hardware catches just the right amount of light, adding a premium accent to both Western and Indo-Western ensembles without overpowering them.
keyFeatures: Material: Genuine Florentine Bridle Leather, Gold-Tone Zamac Buckle

title: Tortoiseshell Oversized Sunglasses
description: Shield your eyes in style with these tortoiseshell oversized sunglasses crafted from hand-polished Italian Mazzucchelli acetate. The cat-eye-inspired frame flatters oval, round, and heart-shaped faces, while UV400-rated gradient brown lenses reduce glare without darkening your view of the world. Spring-loaded temple hinges adapt to different head sizes for a pressure-free fit during long drives and beach days. The warm amber-and-honey tortoise pattern adds timeless sophistication to both casual and dressy looks. Arrives in a vegan-leather hard case with a microfibre cleaning cloth.
keyFeatures: Material: Italian Mazzucchelli Acetate, UV400 CR-39 Lenses

title: Rose Gold Leather Jewelry Box
description: Organise your precious collection with this rose gold leather jewellery box wrapped in saffiano-textured calfskin. The hinged lid reveals two spacious tiers — the top tray holds rings in individual cushioned slots, earrings on padded panels, and bracelets in open compartments, while the lower tier stores necklaces flat to prevent tangling. A built-in mirror under the lid adds dressing-table convenience. Velvet-flocked interiors protect against tarnish and scratches. Whether displayed on a vanity or tucked into a wardrobe, this box keeps your gold, silver, and kundan pieces safe and beautifully accessible.
keyFeatures: Material: Genuine Saffiano-Textured Calfskin Leather, Velvet Lining

title: Oatmeal Cable-Knit Cardigan
description: Wrap up in cosy warmth with this oatmeal cable-knit cardigan crafted from a luxuriously soft wool-acrylic blend. The chunky cable pattern adds visual texture, while the relaxed open-front silhouette layers effortlessly over tees, turtlenecks, and kurtas. Ribbed cuffs and hem retain their shape through repeated wear, and deep patch pockets keep cold hands toasty. The neutral oatmeal shade complements every colour palette, making it a fail-safe layering piece for foggy Delhi mornings, air-conditioned offices, and late-evening bonfires in Rishikesh.

title: Navy Crepe Wide-Leg Jumpsuit
description: This navy crepe wide-leg jumpsuit delivers one-and-done dressing at its finest. A tailored V-neckline and nipped waist give structure to the top half, while fluid wide legs create a trouser-suit illusion that moves with grace. Short cap sleeves offer modest coverage ideal for office settings, and a self-fabric waist tie adds a cinched feminine finish. The matte navy crepe resists wrinkles, making it a reliable choice for day-long conferences and evening cocktail events. Simply switch your accessories — from a leather tote to an embellished clutch — to transform the look entirely.

title: Terracotta Ribbed Co-Ord Set
description: Achieve instant coordination with this terracotta ribbed co-ord set comprising a fitted crop top with a square neckline and matching high-waist wide-leg trousers. The ribbed cotton-modal blend has a dense yet breathable hand-feel that holds its form without overheating. Wear the set together for a polished monochromatic statement, or style each piece separately — the top over high-waist jeans, the trousers with a contrasting blouse. The warm earthy hue complements Indian skin tones beautifully and transitions smoothly from day-out plans to sundowner gatherings.

title: Mustard Floral Kimono Jacket
description: Layer on bohemian charm with this mustard floral kimono jacket printed with oversized peony blooms in blush and sage on a rich saffron ground. The open-front duster silhouette falls to mid-thigh, and wide elbow-length sleeves billow elegantly with movement. Lightweight viscose crepe makes it ideal as a beach cover-up in Goa, a layering piece over evening camisoles, or a stylish alternative to a dupatta with simple kurtis. The vibrant print and flowing drape photograph stunningly, making it a favourite for travel diaries and sunset selfies.

title: Cozy Fleece Lounge Set - Teddy Bear Brown
description: Wrap your little one in cloud-like warmth with this teddy bear brown fleece lounge set designed for lazy weekend mornings and cozy movie nights. The ultra-soft anti-pill polyester fleece feels plush against the skin without adding bulk, while the relaxed jogger-style bottoms feature a gentle elastic waistband and ribbed ankle cuffs for a snug, stay-put fit. The matching crew-neck pullover has raglan sleeves for unrestricted movement during indoor play. Machine washable and quick-drying, this set retains its buttery softness wash after wash.

title: Cotton Pyjama Set - Starry Night Print
description: Sweet dreams start with this enchanting starry night pyjama set crafted from 100% breathable combed cotton that keeps little ones comfortable through every season. The navy blue top features an all-over constellation print with twinkling gold and white stars, paired with matching full-length pyjama bottoms with a covered elastic waistband that never digs in. Flat-lock seams prevent irritation during restless sleep, while the pre-shrunk fabric ensures a consistent fit after every wash. A delightful bedtime companion that makes getting ready for sleep genuinely exciting.

title: Waffle Knit Robe - Cloud White
description: Elevate bath time to a spa-like ritual with this luxuriously soft waffle knit robe in pristine cloud white. The textured honeycomb weave is lightweight yet wonderfully absorbent, making it perfect for wrapping up after a warm bath or a swim in the pool. A self-tie waist belt and two deep front patch pockets add both style and functionality for stashing small treasures. The shawl collar and full-length sleeves with turned-back cuffs give this robe a grown-up sophistication that kids adore. Easy-care cotton blend fabric dries quickly on the line.

title: Velour Tracksuit Set - Candy Pink
description: Let her lounge in style with this irresistibly soft candy pink velour tracksuit set that transitions effortlessly from home comfort to casual outings. The plush cotton-blend velour has a rich, velvety pile that feels indulgent against the skin while remaining breathable for active play. The zip-through hoodie features a lined hood and kangaroo pocket, paired with matching straight-leg track pants with an elasticated drawstring waist. The fabric resists pilling and holds its jewel-like sheen through repeated machine washes. A statement piece that makes relaxation fashionable.

title: Jersey Lounge T-Shirt & Shorts Set - Dino Forest
description: Adventure awaits even on lazy days with this playful jersey lounge set featuring an all-over dinosaur and tropical forest print in earthy greens and terracotta tones. The crew-neck t-shirt is cut from silky-smooth single jersey cotton that drapes lightly over the body, keeping him cool during warm afternoons at home. The matching pull-on shorts sit at a comfortable mid-thigh length with a soft elastic waistband and an internal drawcord for an adjustable fit. Reinforced side seams handle energetic indoor play, while the vibrant print stays vivid through countless washes.

title: Brushed Flannel Pyjama Set - Buffalo Check Red
description: Nothing says cozy quite like classic buffalo check, and this brushed flannel pyjama set in warm red and black delivers that timeless comfort in a child-friendly package. The double-brushed cotton flannel is peached on both sides for an exceptionally soft hand feel that gets even cozier with every wash. The button-front top features a Peter Pan collar and a chest pocket, while the full-length bottoms have a covered elastic waistband with a decorative bow. Designed for cooler nights, the insulating yet breathable weave keeps her snug without overheating during sleep.

title: Happy Feet Ankle Socks Pack of 5
description: Give little feet the comfort they deserve with this vibrant pack of five ankle-length socks featuring cheerful emoji faces on every pair. Knitted from a premium cotton-polyester-spandex blend, these socks offer the perfect balance of softness, stretch, and durability. The reinforced heel and toe zones withstand rough playground action, while the cushioned sole absorbs impact during running and jumping. A non-slip silicone grip on the sole base keeps toddlers steady on tile floors. Bright colors include sunshine yellow, sky blue, mint, coral, and white.

title: Scholar White School Crew Socks Pack of 3
description: The definitive school sock built to survive the toughest term. This pack of three pristine white crew-length socks is constructed from thick-knit combed cotton with a ribbed cuff that stays up all day without sagging. Reinforced terry loop cushioning on the sole provides extra padding for long school hours, while the seamless toe closure means zero irritation even during PT class. The antimicrobial treatment keeps odour at bay. These socks maintain their crisp white appearance wash after wash thanks to advanced colour retention technology. A must-have school essential.

title: Zoo Parade Fun Print Socks Pack of 6
description: Turn sock time into storytime with this delightful pack of six animal-themed socks that kids beg to wear. Each pair showcases a different zoo animal — panda, giraffe, elephant, lion, penguin, and fox — in vibrant jacquard-knit patterns that won't fade or peel. The combed cotton body keeps feet dry and comfortable, while the elastane blend ensures a stretchy yet secure fit around tiny ankles. Flat-knit toe seams prevent bunching inside shoes. These mid-calf socks are the perfect conversation starter at playdates and make getting dressed a fun game every morning.

title: Turbo Sprint Sports Socks Pack of 3
description: Engineered for young athletes, this trio of performance sports socks delivers superior comfort during high-energy activities. The moisture-wicking CoolMax fibre blend pulls sweat away from the skin, keeping feet dry during cricket practice, football matches, and athletics. An arch compression band provides midfoot support, and the extra-thick terry sole cushions impact during running and jumping. The mesh ventilation panel on the instep promotes airflow to prevent overheating. Available in a sporty combination of neon green with black, electric blue with grey, and red with navy trim.

title: Candy Stripe Knee-High Socks Pack of 3
description: Add a pop of personality to any outfit with these eye-catching knee-high socks featuring bold candy-stripe patterns in three irresistible color combos: magenta and white, teal and lemon, and lavender and peach. The fine-gauge cotton knit hugs the leg gently without being restrictive, and the wide ribbed cuff with a gentle elastic ensures they stay pulled up throughout the day. The reinforced toe and heel areas endure slides, skips, and cartwheels. These statement socks pair beautifully with dresses, skirts, and shorts, adding a playful retro-chic vibe to any ensemble.

title: Dino Adventure Graphic Cotton T-Shirt
description: Fuel his imagination with this vibrant dinosaur adventure graphic tee that transforms a simple top into a prehistoric playground. A large screen-printed illustration of a friendly T-Rex exploring a jungle covers the front in rich, fade-resistant inks on premium 180 GSM bio-washed cotton. The fabric is pre-shrunk and enzyme-treated for an instantly soft hand feel that gets even better with each wash. Ribbed crew neck holds its shape, and the relaxed fit allows unrestricted movement for climbing, running, and all the wild adventures his day holds. Available in forest green.

title: Sunshine Stripe Cotton Polo T-Shirt
description: A polished polo that transitions effortlessly from classroom to birthday parties. This classic striped polo features alternating bands of sunshine yellow and crisp white in yarn-dyed cotton pique that won't fade after washing. The buttoned placket with contrast navy inner tape adds a sophisticated touch, while the ribbed collar and sleeve hems hold their structure through active play. Crafted from breathable 200 GSM cotton pique with a touch of elastane for stretch comfort, this polo looks as smart at the end of the day as it did in the morning. Side vents allow easy movement.

title: Space Explorer Character Print T-Shirt
description: Blast off into style with this out-of-this-world character print tee featuring a fun astronaut cat floating among colourful planets and stars. The playful glow-in-the-dark details on the stars create a magical surprise at bedtime, making this tee an instant favourite. Sewn from ring-spun cotton that resists pilling, the fabric is garment-washed for a broken-in softness right out of the pack. A slightly dropped shoulder and longer back hem give it a modern silhouette, while the taped neck seam prevents scratching. Comes in a deep navy base that makes the vivid space artwork pop beautifully.

title: Ocean Breeze Colour Block T-Shirt
description: Clean, contemporary, and effortlessly cool — this colour-block tee pairs a teal upper panel with a coral lower panel divided by a crisp white stripe for a beach-ready aesthetic. The lightweight 160 GSM slub cotton has a natural texture and drapes beautifully, keeping kids cool during hot summer days. Reinforced shoulder seams withstand rough-and-tumble play, while the pre-washed finish means zero shrinkage after laundering. The regular fit works equally well tucked into shorts or worn loose over joggers. A versatile wardrobe staple that mixes and matches with practically everything.

title: Classic Essential Round Neck T-Shirt
description: Every child needs that one perfect plain tee, and this is it. Cut from premium 180 GSM double-combed cotton in a rich cherry red, this essential round-neck tee delivers buttery softness without compromising on durability. The fabric is bio-washed and mercerized for a subtle sheen and superior colour fastness that endures fifty-plus washes without fading. Triple-stitched hems and a taped shoulder-to-shoulder neck seam ensure longevity, while the classic regular fit provides room to grow. Layer it under jackets, pair with jeans, or wear solo — simplicity never looked this good.

title: Urban Flex Slim Fit Denim Jeans
description: These aren't just jeans — they're a confidence boost for your growing kid. The slim tapered silhouette in a versatile mid-wash indigo denim features light whisker detailing and a subtle fading effect for an on-trend lived-in look. The secret weapon is the built-in stretch from 2% elastane blended with premium cotton denim, allowing kids to run, squat, and climb without any restriction. An adjustable inner waistband accommodates growing tummies, and the five-pocket design includes a coin pocket perfect for hiding tiny treasures. Riveted stress points ensure these jeans last season after season.

title: Cloud Comfort Cotton Jogger Pants
description: When comfort meets cool, you get these supremely soft cotton joggers that kids refuse to take off. The brushed French terry interior feels like a gentle hug against the skin, while the structured outer face maintains a neat appearance suitable for outings beyond the living room. Finished in a cool slate grey with contrast olive green drawstring and ankle cuffs, the tapered leg creates a modern streamlined look. Two deep side pockets hold snack bars and small toys, and the elasticated waistband with internal drawcord adjusts for a personalized fit. Perfect for weekend outings, travel days, and everything in between.

title: Explorer Cargo Pants with Utility Pockets
description: Built for the young adventurer who needs pockets for every treasure found along the way. These rugged cargo pants in an earthy khaki feature six functional pockets — including two large flap cargo pockets at the thigh with secure snap closures. The sturdy cotton twill fabric is garment-dyed for a rich depth of colour and pre-washed for instant softness. Articulated knees provide freedom of movement for climbing and crouching, while the adjustable cuff with a snap button lets him convert to a cropped look on warmer days. Triple-needle stitching at seams guarantees exceptional durability.

title: Everyday Classic Regular Fit Chinos
description: A wardrobe workhorse that transitions seamlessly from school functions to family dinners, these regular-fit chinos in a warm camel tan are the definition of smart-casual done right for kids. The mid-weight cotton satin weave offers a smooth, refined finish while remaining breathable through long hours. The adjustable inner waistband ensures a secure fit as he grows, and the flat-front design sits cleanly without bunching. Pressed front creases maintain a polished look, while the straight leg provides timeless proportions. Machine washable with easy-iron properties, these chinos practically take care of themselves.

title: Autumn Trail Corduroy Pants
description: Bring heritage charm to his wardrobe with these luxuriously soft corduroy pants in a deep rust orange that captures autumn's warmth. The fine 14-wale corduroy has a velvety hand feel kids love, while the cotton base with a hint of stretch ensures all-day comfort. The straight-leg cut pairs effortlessly with knitwear, button-downs, and casual tees. An adjustable internal waistband grows with your child, and the sturdy metal button and zip fly offer easy dressing. Knee reinforcement patches extend the life of these cozy pants.

title: Cool Breeze Denim Shorts
description: Summer's best friend — these light-wash denim shorts deliver classic style with modern comfort features that keep kids moving freely. The above-knee length hits the sweet spot between trendy and practical, while the stretch denim with 3% elastane allows unrestricted running, jumping, and biking. Subtle distressed detailing at the front pockets adds character, and the turn-up cuffs give a laid-back weekend vibe. The adjustable internal waistband means these shorts adapt as your child grows, extending their wearable life significantly. Five-pocket styling with copper-tone rivets completes the authentic denim aesthetic.

title: Tropical Vibes Cotton Pull-On Shorts
description: Pull on, run out, and play all day — these breezy cotton shorts in a cheerful tropical leaf print make dressing easy and fun. The all-over print in shades of emerald, lime, and teal on an ivory base brings instant holiday vibes to any outfit. Made from soft, breathable poplin cotton with an easy-on elasticated waistband and a functional drawstring for adjustable fit. Side seam pockets are deep enough for storing shells, pebbles, and other backyard finds. The lightweight fabric dries quickly after water play, making these the ultimate summer essential from pool parties to picnic outings.

description: Designed with input from junior sports coaches, these athletic shorts deliver genuine performance features scaled for young athletes. The lightweight polyester-mesh fabric offers four-way stretch and rapid moisture wicking that keeps skin dry during intense activity. A built-in brief liner provides additional support, while the ergonomic flat seam construction eliminates chafing during long hours of play. The electric blue body with reflective silver side panels ensures visibility during evening outdoor activities. An elasticated waistband with an internal drawcord offers a secure, personalized fit. Perfect for PE class, weekend football, or energetic playground sessions.

title: Weekend Chill Bermuda Shorts
description: For the kid who likes a longer, relaxed fit, these knee-length bermuda shorts in olive green enzyme-washed cotton canvas strike the ideal balance between comfort and style. The garment-wash gives each pair a unique lived-in character, while the sturdy canvas withstands adventurous outings. Two slash pockets at the front and two welt pockets at the back provide ample storage. The zip fly gives a grown-up feel that older kids appreciate, and the adjustable inner waistband is a thoughtful touch for in-between sizes.

title: Garden Bloom Floral Cotton Dress
description: Watch her twirl with delight in this enchanting floral dress that captures the magic of a blooming garden. The allover ditsy floral print in shades of rose pink, buttercup yellow, and sage green dances across a crisp white cotton voile base. A smocked bodice provides a flattering fit while allowing room for movement, and the flutter sleeves add a romantic feminine touch. The fully lined skirt falls to a comfortable below-knee length with a generous flare perfect for spinning. A concealed back zip makes dressing a breeze. A contrasting white Peter Pan collar adds preppy charm, while the detachable fabric sash allows her to style it tied, bowed, or free. Two hidden side pockets and pearlized buttons running down the front complete this polished yet playful design. Fully machine washable.

Adjustable crossback straps with antique brass buckles allow for a perfect fit as she grows, and the spacious front kangaroo pocket holds crayons, hair clips, and secret notes. The A-line skirt falls to mid-thigh for comfortable movement, and the sturdy fabric holds up admirably against daily wear. Pair with striped tights and boots for an effortlessly adorable ensemble.
